project_type: React + TypeScript + Vite board game (adaptation of Rising Sun)
test_framework: No test framework configured (no tests/ directory)
test_command: npx vite build (only build verification available, no tests)
verification_instructions: Run npx vite build to confirm the project builds without breaking changes
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode. Pre-existing TS errors in BattlePanel.tsx (type mismatch for t function prop) that do not block vite build. The build uses vite which transpiles TS without strict checking.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing patterns in the codebase.
key_patterns: Zustand store (gameStore.ts) holds all game state and actions. Game logic in utils/gameLogic.ts is pure functions that take/return GameState. Components use useGameStore hook. i18n with TranslationKey types. Icons defined as SVG components in Icons.tsx. CSS in single minified App.css file. CLANS array has color definitions. HARVEST_BADGE_META in GameBoard.tsx defines region hex colors. ClanShield renders PNG seals. Popups use .monster-placement-popup class pattern.
directory_structure: src/components/ (all React components), src/store/ (Zustand store), src/utils/ (game logic), src/types/ (TypeScript types), src/i18n/ (translations), src/img/ (images), public/ (static assets)
